languages.text: "На моем корабле нет неважных людей. Всех будут лечить одинаково — и в порядке очереди".

traits.locale_text: Вы не важнее других, сидите и ждите

languages.text: "There are no unimportant people on my ship. Everyone will be treated equally — and based on your place in the queue."
languages.original_text: "На моем корабле нет неважных людей. Всех будут лечить одинаково — и в порядке очереди".

traits.locale_text: "There are no unimportant people on my ship. Everyone will be treated equally — and based on your place in the queue."
"There are no unimportant people on my ship. Everyone will be treated equally — and based on your place in the queue."
"There are no unimportant people on my ship. Everyone will be treated equally — and based on your place in the queue."

languages.text: 「私の船には、取るに足りない人などいない。皆は平等に扱われるだろう。そして、列の順番に従って」
languages.original_text: "There are no unimportant people on my ship. Everyone will be treated equally — and based on your place in the queue."

languages.text: "Gemimde önemsiz insan yoktur. Herkese eşit ve sıradaki yerine göre muamele edilecek."
languages.original_text: "There are no unimportant people on my ship. Everyone will be treated equally — and based on your place in the queue."

traits.locale_text: "Gemimde önemsiz insan yoktur. Herkese eşit ve sıradaki yerine göre muamele edilecek."

languages.text: “在我的舰船上，没有无关紧要之人，所有人都会得到平等对待。回到你的队列中去。”
languages.original_text: "There are no unimportant people on my ship. Everyone will be treated equally — and based on your place in the queue."

traits.locale_text: “在我的舰船上，没有无关紧要之人，所有人都会得到平等对待。回到你的队列中去。”

languages.text: "Auf meinem Schiff gibt es keine unwichtigen Leute. Alle werden gleich behandelt ... und basierend auf ihrem Platz in der Schlange."
languages.original_text: "There are no unimportant people on my ship. Everyone will be treated equally — and based on your place in the queue."

traits.locale_text: "Auf meinem Schiff gibt es keine unwichtigen Leute. Alle werden gleich behandelt ... und basierend auf ihrem Platz in der Schlange."

languages.text: « À mon bord, tous les membres d'équipage sont traités sur un pied d'égalité. Attendez votre tour, comme tout le monde. »
languages.original_text: "There are no unimportant people on my ship. Everyone will be treated equally — and based on your place in the queue."

traits.locale_text: « À mon bord, tous les membres d'équipage sont traités sur un pied d'égalité. Attendez votre tour, comme tout le monde. »

languages.text: «Todo el mundo en esta nave importa. Todos recibirán un mismo trato... en función de su posición en la cola».
languages.original_text: "There are no unimportant people on my ship. Everyone will be treated equally — and based on your place in the queue."

traits.locale_text: «Todo el mundo en esta nave importa. Todos recibirán un mismo trato... en función de su posición en la cola».
